meaning: Preliminary Scholastic Aptitude Test [心]学业能力倾向初步测验
examples: Beside the PSAT, I have taken the ACT and a vocational guidance test.
There is PSAT test in 5th classrooms and Library at West High from 8am to 12 noon today. Please keep away from the area. Thank you for your cooperation!
Even the local public high school treated us with great respect and consideration when I needed to register three of my kids to sit for the PSAT exam.
You did great on the PSAT.
